speaker: Barry Schwartz
verification_notes: Created 2026-05-26 via the Six-State Buildout (Phase 8 human-gated promotion). prototype_only reconstruction — paraphrase of the speaker's documented idea; NOT a verified verbatim excerpt. Barry Schwartz is Professor of Psychology at Swarthmore College (now at Berkeley) and author of The Paradox of Choice (2004, HarperCollins). The TED 2005 talk is a canonical official source with over 6 million views. Tier-1 (academic + widely disseminated). Verified via web search: official URL https://www.ted.com/talks/barry_schwartz_the_paradox_of_choice confirmed on ted.com; transcript available at same URL with ?view=transcript parameter. TED transcripts are not reliably WebFetch-readable, so paraphrase is the honest label.
